title: ERP Inventory Snapshot — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw ERP daily inventory snapshot records before ingestion into brz_freshsip.erp_inventory_raw. One record per SKU per warehouse per daily export.

warehouse_id.description: FreshSip warehouse identifier; references the warehouse dimension

sku_id.description: FreshSip product SKU identifier; references the product master

units_on_hand.description: Current physical units in the warehouse; cast to INTEGER in Silver; must be >= 0

units_in_transit.description: Units in transit to this warehouse from production or other warehouses; cast to INTEGER in Silver

units_reserved.description: Units reserved for pending orders but not yet shipped; cast to INTEGER in Silver

snapshot_date.description: Calendar date of the inventory snapshot; cast to DATE in Silver

snapshot_timestamp.description: Full timestamp of when the snapshot was taken by ERP; cast to TIMESTAMP in Silver

reorder_point_units.description: Reorder threshold for this SKU at this warehouse; loaded into ref_reorder_points in Silver; cast to INTEGER

standard_cost_per_unit.description: Standard cost per unit in USD from ERP; used to compute inventory_value in Silver; cast to DECIMAL
